Calling All Stalwarts:We've got trouble on Southsun Cove again. Tensions between the resettled refugees and their Consortium hosts are about to boil over, and the local wildlife is more aggressive than ever. On Captain Magnus' orders, I am deputizing any and all qualified volunteers to help me keep the peace. If you're up for a challenge and you have the skills, come see me so we can shut down this unrest before it gets unmanageable.—Inspector Ellen Kiel

Calling on all Astral Ward for aid in Amnytas.    Some great force lingers above us in the clouds; we've had additional rift sightings on all bastions. Kryptis are emerging en masse. With urgency, please send us your aid.    Vanak Faithwalker

Captain Logan Thackeray needs your help to infiltrate the bandits that prey on Shaemoor Valley. He has provided you with the location of their hideout and a disguise to help you move among them unnoticed.
Captain Magnus the Bloody-Handed is informing adventurers about Zephyr Sanctum.
Captain Magnus, Ship's Council, Lion's Arch
Captain Magnus: This gas...burning my lungs. Fall back. Find your exits.

Captain Sylvour Denwatcher,Firstly I hope you are well, old friend. I know these days are dire.    I will keep this brief. I am writing to inquire about one of your inmates. A certain...suave sylvari, if I'm to believe the rumors. I've done my research, and I see that he's led a tumultuous and storied life so far: involuntary test subject, Consortium cartographer and project team leader, Molten Facility liberator, and corporate saboteur. For all his struggles, he's developed something of a reputation, even in the quieter halls of Divinity's Reach. And as it turns out, I have use for a man of his particular "prestige" and skillset.    There are places I cannot move through without notice and things I cannot do from my current station without drawing unwanted attention, so I've learned to delegate more effectively. In this case, he would serve as an...extension of the Shining Blade and the Krytan crown—under my express supervision, of course. If you think he'd be at all cooperative, I am interested in purchasing his billet.    Thank you for your time,    Countess Anise, Exemplar of the Shining Blade

Captain Tervelan said the letters he received were signed by Minister Arton. If Arton ordered the Falcon Company's deaths, then he's a danger to Queen Jennah—and he's working against the treaty at Ebonhawke. He must be stopped.

Captain Thackeray has been a friend, and shown a genuine interest in your well-being. He said he'd keep an eye out for ways you could help Divinity's Reach. Time to check in and see if you can lend a hand.
Captain Thackeray protects the city of Divinity's Reach, and guards Queen Jennah from harm. If there's trouble, he knows to call on you. Your friendship is a source of strength for both of you.
